mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRS_ID as id, P.PRS_NAME as name, P.STORED_FILE_NM as image, P.STATUS_MSG as status, P.POPULAR_ORDER,
-- 🌟 RANK() 대신 ROW_NUMBER() 및 타이 브레이커 적용 ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY ( IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) * 1 + IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) * 5 ) DESC, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) DESC, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) DESC, P.PRS_ID ASC ) AS GLOBAL_RANK,
COUNT(*) OVER () AS TOTAL_STARS
FROM WH_PRESS P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRS_ID, COUNT(*) as viewCount FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' GROUP BY PRS_ID ) A ON P.PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID WHERE P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' ) T WHERE T.POPULAR_ORDER > 0 ORDER BY T.POPULAR_ORDER ASC LIMIT 16

SELECT P.PRS_ID as id, P.PRS_NAME as name, P.STORED_FILE_NM as image, P.STATUS_MSG as status, P.PRS_HOMEPAGE as homepage, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) AS FOLLOWER_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID AND ACTION = 'IMPRESSION') AS viewCount, IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS LIKE_CNT, IFNULL(P.COMMENT_CNT, 0) AS COMMENT_CNT, IFNULL(P.SHARE_CNT, 0) AS SHARE_CNT, IF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_GUEST_LIKE WHERE TARGET_TYPE = 'STAR' AND TARGET_ID = P.PRS_ID AND DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}) > 0, 1, 0) AS IS_LIKED,
-- 🌟 신규: 전체 스타 수 (분모용, 예: 8B pages) (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND IS_STAR = 'Y') AS TOTAL_STARS,
-- 🌟 신규: 현재 스타의 실시간 글로벌 랭킹 추출 ( SELECT global_rank FROM ( SELECT P2.PRS_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY ( IFNULL(A2.viewCount, 0) * 1 + IFNULL(P2.LIKE_CNT, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(P2.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) * 5 ) DESC, IFNULL(A2.viewCount, 0) DESC, IFNULL(P2.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) DESC, P2.PRS_ID ASC ) AS global_rank FROM WH_PRESS P2 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRS_ID, COUNT(*) as viewCount FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' GROUP BY PRS_ID ) A2 ON P2.PRS_ID = A2.PRS_ID WHERE P2.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P2.IS_STAR = 'Y' ) r WHERE r.PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID ) AS GLOBAL_RANK, P.OWNER_EMAIL
FROM WH_PRESS P WHERE P.PRS_ID = #{starId}

-- 1. 원래 스타가 작성한 피드 SELECT M.PRS_ID, M.CON_ID, M.CON_BODY, M.YOUTUBE_URL, M.IS_PINNED, M.CREATED_DATE, D.THUMB_URL as image, D.MEDIA_URL, D.MEDIA_TYPE, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA WHERE CON_ID = M.CON_ID) as media_count, P.PRS_NAME as MEM_NAME, P.STORED_FILE_NM as MEM_PICTURE, IFNULL(M.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS LIKE_CNT, IFNULL(M.COMMENT_CNT, 0) AS COMMENT_CNT, IFNULL(M.SHARE_CNT, 0) AS SHARE_CNT, IF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_GUEST_LIKE WHERE TARGET_TYPE = 'FEED' AND TARGET_ID = M.CON_ID AND DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}) > 0, 1, 0) AS IS_LIKED, 'STAR' AS FEED_TYPE,
-- 🌟 [수정] 개별 피드의 컬럼에서 꺼내며, N일 경우 NULL로 원천 차단 IF(M.IS_PINNED = 'Y', M.PIN_LINK_TEXT1, NULL) AS PIN_LINK_TEXT1, IF(M.IS_PINNED = 'Y', M.PIN_LINK_URL1, NULL) AS PIN_LINK_URL1, IF(M.IS_PINNED = 'Y', M.PIN_LINK_TEXT2, NULL) AS PIN_LINK_TEXT2, IF(M.IS_PINNED = 'Y', M.PIN_LINK_URL2, NULL) AS PIN_LINK_URL2
FROM WH_STAR_CONTENT M LEFT JOIN STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA D ON M.CON_ID = D.CON_ID AND D.SORT_ORDER = 0 LEFT JOIN WH_PRESS P ON M.PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID WHERE M.PRS_ID = #{starId}
UNION ALL
-- 2. 관리자가 작성한 공지 피드 SELECT A.ADMIN_ID AS PRS_ID, CONCAT('A', A.ADMIN_CON_ID) AS CON_ID, A.CON_BODY, NULL AS YOUTUBE_URL, 'N' AS IS_PINNED, A.CREATED_DATE, A.IMAGE_URL as image, A.IMAGE_URL as MEDIA_URL, 'PHOTO' as MEDIA_TYPE, IF(A.IMAGE_URL IS NULL, 0, 1) as media_count, CASE WHEN A.ADMIN_LEVEL = 'GLOBAL' THEN '운영자 공지' ELSE '지역 공지' END as MEM_NAME, 'assets/img/defaultImg/avatar.svg' as MEM_PICTURE, 0 AS LIKE_CNT, 0 AS COMMENT_CNT, 0 AS SHARE_CNT, 0 AS IS_LIKED, 'ADMIN' AS FEED_TYPE,
-- 🌟 [수정] 관리자 공지는 프로모션 링크가 없으므로 컬럼 갯수를 맞추기 위해 NULL 반환 NULL AS PIN_LINK_TEXT1, NULL AS PIN_LINK_URL1, NULL AS PIN_LINK_TEXT2, NULL AS PIN_LINK_URL2
FROM WH_ADMIN_CONTENT A WHERE A.ADMIN_LEVEL = 'GLOBAL' OR (A.ADMIN_LEVEL = 'LOCAL' AND A.ADMIN_COUNTRY = (SELECT PRS_COUNTRY FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = #{starId}))
-- 최종 정렬 ORDER BY IS_PINNED DESC, CREATED_DATE DESC

SELECT CONCAT('A', ADMIN_CON_ID) AS CON_ID, CON_BODY, NULL AS YOUTUBE_URL, CREATED_DATE, 'N' AS IS_PINNED, ADMIN_ID AS PRS_ID, CASE WHEN ADMIN_LEVEL = 'GLOBAL' THEN '운영자 공지' ELSE '지역 공지' END AS PRS_NAME, 'assets/img/defaultImg/avatar.svg' AS STORED_FILE_NM, 'ADMIN' AS FEED_TYPE, IMAGE_URL FROM WH_ADMIN_CONTENT WHERE ADMIN_CON_ID = #{realConId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_AD_LOG ( MEM_ID, PRS_ID, AD_TYPE, OS, ACTION, CREATED_DATE ) VALUES ( #{MEM_ID}, #{PRS_ID}, #{AD_TYPE}, #{OS}, #{ACTION}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT wgc.CMT_ID, wgc.TARGET_TYPE, wgc.TARGET_ID, wgc.NICKNAME, wgc.CONTENT, DATE_FORMAT(wgc.CREATED_AT, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS date, wgc.DEVICE_ID FROM WH_GUEST_COMMENT wgc LEFT JOIN WH_GUEST_BLACKLIST wb ON wb.PRS_ID = wgc.TARGET_ID AND wb.DEVICE_ID = wgc.DEVICE_ID WHERE TARGET_TYPE = #{targetType} AND TARGET_ID = #{targetId} AND STATUS = 'NORMAL' AND wb.DEVICE_ID IS NULL ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_GUEST_COMMENT (TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, DEVICE_ID, NICKNAME, PASSWORD, CONTENT) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{deviceId}, #{nickname}, #{password}, #{content})
INSERT INTO WH_GUEST_REPORT (TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, REPORTER_DEVICE_ID, REASON, CREATED_DATE) VALUES ('COMMENT', #{cmtId}, #{deviceId}, #{reason}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT PASSWORD FROM WH_GUEST_COMMENT WHERE CMT_ID = #{cmtId}
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_GUEST_COMMENT SET STATUS = 'DELETED' WHERE CMT_ID = #{cmtId}

choose.when: UPDATE WH_PRESS SET COMMENT_CNT = COMMENT_CNT + #{amount} WHERE PRS_ID = #{targetId} AND COMMENT_CNT + #{amount} >= 0
choose.otherwise: UPDATE WH_STAR_CONTENT SET COMMENT_CNT = COMMENT_CNT + #{amount} WHERE CON_ID = #{targetId} AND COMMENT_CNT + #{amount} >= 0

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_GUEST_LIKE (TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, DEVICE_ID) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{deviceId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM WH_GUEST_LIKE WHERE TARGET_TYPE = #{targetType} AND TARGET_ID = #{targetId} AND DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}

choose.when: UPDATE WH_PRESS SET SHARE_CNT = SHARE_CNT + 1 WHERE PRS_ID = #{targetId}

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_GUEST_BLACKLIST (DEVICE_ID, PRS_ID, REASON, CREATED_DATE) VALUES (#{targetDeviceId}, #{prsId}, #{reason}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE REASON = #{reason}
INSERT INTO WH_GUEST_REPORT (TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_ID, REPORTER_DEVICE_ID, REASON, CREATED_DATE) VALUES ('COMMENT', #{cmtId}, #{deviceId}, #{reason}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_GUEST_BLOCK WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_PRESS ( PRS_ID, APP_ID, PRS_PWD, PRS_NAME, PRS_COUNTRY, PRS_TYPE, PRS_AUTH, PRS_USE_YN, IS_STAR, PRS_CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{pageId}, #{pageId}, '', #{name}, #{country}, '4', 'ST', 'Y', 'Y', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT ID, PAGE_ID, EMAIL, TOKEN, USED, EXPIRES_AT, IF(EXPIRES_AT > NOW(), 'Y', 'N') AS IS_VALID, TEMP_PWD FROM CLAIM_TOKENS WHERE TOKEN = #{token}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MESSAGES ( PAGE_ID, SENDER_TYPE, MESSAGE, IS_READ, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{pageId}, #{senderType}, -- 'USER' 또는 'ADMIN' #{message}, 0, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT PAGE_ID, SENDER_TYPE, MESSAGE, IS_READ, CREATED_AT FROM MESSAGES WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE MESSAGES SET IS_READ = 1 WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId}
AND SENDER_TYPE = 'ADMIN'
AND SENDER_TYPE = 'USER'
AND IS_READ = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRS_ID as id, P.PRS_NAME as name, P.STORED_FILE_NM as image, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) as viewCount, IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) as LIKE_CNT, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) as followerCount,
-- 🌟 RANK() 대신 ROW_NUMBER() 사용 + 동점자 정렬 기준 추가 ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY -- 1. 통합 점수 ( IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) * 1 + IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) * 5 ) DESC, -- 2. 동점일 경우 조회수 높은 순 IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) DESC, -- 3. 그래도 동점이면 팔로워 많은 순 IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) DESC, -- 4. 그래도 동점이면 먼저 생성된 계정 우선 P.PRS_ID ASC ) AS GLOBAL_RANK
FROM WH_PRESS P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRS_ID, COUNT(*) as viewCount FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' GROUP BY PRS_ID ) A ON P.PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID WHERE P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' ) T ORDER BY T.GLOBAL_RANK ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRS_ID as id, P.PRS_NAME as name, P.STORED_FILE_NM as image, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) as viewCount, IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) as LIKE_CNT, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) as followerCount,
-- 🌟 좋아요/팔로워 가중치를 뺀 순수 '수익(조회수)' 기반 랭킹 ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY -- 1. 수익 점수 (오직 조회수 기준) IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) DESC, -- 2. 동점일 경우 팔로워 많은 순 IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) DESC, -- 3. 그래도 동점이면 먼저 생성된 계정 우선 P.PRS_ID ASC ) AS GLOBAL_RANK
FROM WH_PRESS P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRS_ID, COUNT(*) as viewCount FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' GROUP BY PRS_ID ) A ON P.PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID WHERE P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' ) T ORDER BY T.GLOBAL_RANK ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRS_ID as id, P.PRS_NAME as name, P.STORED_FILE_NM as image, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) as viewCount, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) as displayViewCount, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) as FOLLOWER_CNT,
-- 🌟 DB 컬럼이 아닌 ROW_NUMBER() 함수로 실시간 랭킹 계산 (동점자 방어 포함) ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) DESC, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) DESC, P.PRS_ID ASC ) AS globalRank,
-- 명세서 하위 호환을 위한 대문자 키값 추가 ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) DESC, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) DESC, P.PRS_ID ASC ) AS GLOBAL_RANK,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_STAR_CONTENT WHERE PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID) AS TOTAL_STARS
FROM WH_PRESS P INNER JOIN ( -- 핵심: 특정 날짜에 조회수가 발생한 유저만 그룹화하여 속도 최적화 SELECT PRS_ID, COUNT(*) as viewCount FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE ACTION = 'IMPRESSION'
AND DATE(CREATED_DATE) = #{date}
AND CREATED_DATE >= CURDATE()
GROUP BY PRS_ID ) A ON P.PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID WHERE P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' ) T ORDER BY T.globalRank ASC LIMIT 500

WITH DailyCounts AS ( -- 날짜별, 스타별 조회수 집계 SELECT DATE(A.CREATED_DATE) as rank_date, A.PRS_ID, COUNT(*) as viewCount FROM WH_AD_LOG A WHERE A.ACTION = 'IMPRESSION'
AND DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{targetMonth}
GROUP BY DATE(A.CREATED_DATE), A.PRS_ID ), RankedDaily AS ( -- 각 날짜별로 조회수 내림차순 순위 부여 SELECT rank_date, PRS_ID, viewCount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY rank_date ORDER BY viewCount DESC) as rn FROM DailyCounts ) -- 각 날짜의 1위만 추출하여 스타 정보와 조인 SELECT DATE_FORMAT(R.rank_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as rankDate, R.viewCount, P.PRS_ID as id, P.PRS_NAME as name, P.STORED_FILE_NM as image FROM RankedDaily R JOIN WH_PRESS P ON R.PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID WHERE R.rn = 1 AND P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' ORDER BY R.rank_date DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRS_ID as id, P.PRS_NAME as name, P.STORED_FILE_NM as image, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) as viewCount, IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) as LIKE_CNT, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) as followerCount,
-- 해당 월의 조회수 + 현재 시점의 좋아요/팔로워 가중치 합산 (IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) * 1 + IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) * 5) as score,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY (IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) * 1 + IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) * 5) DESC, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) DESC, P.PRS_ID ASC ) AS GLOBAL_RANK
FROM WH_PRESS P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRS_ID, COUNT(*) as viewCount FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{targetMonth} GROUP BY PRS_ID ) A ON P.PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID WHERE P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' ) T WHERE T.viewCount > 0 ORDER BY T.GLOBAL_RANK ASC LIMIT 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRS_ID as id, P.PRS_NAME as name, P.STORED_FILE_NM as image, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) as viewCount, IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) as LIKE_CNT, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) as followerCount,
(IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) * 1 + IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) * 5) as score,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY (IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) * 1 + IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) * 5) DESC, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) DESC, P.PRS_ID ASC ) AS GLOBAL_RANK
FROM WH_PRESS P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRS_ID, COUNT(*) as viewCount FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATED_DATE, '%Y') = #{targetYear} GROUP BY PRS_ID ) A ON P.PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID WHERE P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' ) T WHERE T.viewCount > 0 ORDER BY T.GLOBAL_RANK ASC LIMIT 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_PRESS ( PRS_ID, PRS_PWD, PRS_NAME, PRS_COUNTRY, PRS_TYPE, PRS_AUTH, PRS_USE_YN, APP_ID, PRS_CREATE_DATE, IS_STAR, OWNER_EMAIL ) VALUES ( #{newStarId}, CONCAT('*', UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1(#{password}))))), #{reqName}, #{country}, '4', 'ST', 'Y', #{newStarId}, NOW(), 'Y', #{email} )
mapper.select: SELECT PRS_ID as id, PRS_NAME as slug, PRS_COUNTRY as country FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_COUNTRY = #{country} AND OWNER_EMAIL IS NULL AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND OWNER_EMAIL IS NULL ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 20
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_PRESS SET OWNER_EMAIL = #{email}, FIREBASE_UID = #{uid}, PRS_PWD = CONCAT('*', UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1('SOCIAL_OAUTH_USER'))))) -- 임시 비밀번호 처리 WHERE PRS_NAME = #{reqName} AND PRS_COUNTRY = #{country} AND OWNER_EMAIL IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT PRS_ID as starId, PRS_NAME as name, PRS_AUTH as auth FROM WH_PRESS WHERE OWNER_EMAIL = #{email} AND IS_STAR = 'Y' AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT PRS_ID, PRS_AUTH FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = #{PRS_ID} AND PRS_PWD = CONCAT('*', UPPER(SHA1(UNHEX(SHA1(#{PRS_PWD}))))) AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_PRESS SET PRS_TOKEN = #{starToken}, TOKEN_EXPIRED_DATE = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) -- 토큰 유효기간 30일 WHERE PRS_ID = #{starId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STAR_CONTENT_MEDIA (CON_ID, MEDIA_TYPE, MEDIA_URL, THUMB_URL, SORT_ORDER) VALUES (#{CON_ID}, #{MEDIA_TYPE}, #{MEDIA_URL}, #{THUMB_URL}, #{SORT_ORDER})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_COUNTRY = #{country} AND (OWNER_EMAIL IS NULL OR OWNER_EMAIL = '') AND PRS_TYPE = '4'
SELECT PRS_ID as starId, PRS_NAME as name, PRS_AUTH as auth FROM WH_PRESS WHERE OWNER_EMAIL = #{email} AND FIREBASE_UID = #{uid} -- 🌟 핵심 보안: 비밀번호처럼 검증 AND IS_STAR = 'Y' AND PRS_USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT FCM_TOKEN as fcmToken, IFNULL(PUSH_YN, 'Y') as pushYn FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_ID = #{starId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT P.PRS_ID as id, P.PRS_NAME as name, P.STORED_FILE_NM as image, P.STATUS_MSG as status, P.PRS_COUNTRY, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) as viewCount, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) AS FOLLOWER_CNT,
-- 글로벌 랭킹 보존 (검색 필터 전 전체 순위 기준) ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY ( IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) * 1 + IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) * 5 ) DESC, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) DESC, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) DESC, P.PRS_ID ASC ) AS GLOBAL_RANK,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND IS_STAR = 'Y') AS TOTAL_STARS
FROM WH_PRESS P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRS_ID, COUNT(*) as viewCount FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' GROUP BY PRS_ID ) A ON P.PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID WHERE P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' ) T WHERE LOWER(T.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') ORDER BY T.GLOBAL_RANK ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND IS_STAR = 'Y' AND LOWER(PRS_NAME) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%')

SELECT C.CON_ID as contentId, C.PRS_ID as starId, P.PRS_NAME as starName, P.STORED_FILE_NM as starImage, C.CON_BODY as content FROM WH_STAR_CONTENT C JOIN WH_PRESS P ON C.PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID WHERE P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' AND LOWER(C.CON_BODY) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') ORDER BY C.CREATED_DATE DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_STAR_CONTENT C JOIN WH_PRESS P ON C.PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID WHERE P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' AND LOWER(C.CON_BODY) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_COMMENT_BLOCK ( BLOCKER_DEVICE_ID, BLOCKED_DEVICE_ID, BLOCKED_NICKNAME, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{blockerDeviceId}, #{blockedDeviceId}, #{blockedNickname}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT BLOCKED_DEVICE_ID as blockedDeviceId, BLOCKED_NICKNAME as blockedNickname FROM WH_COMMENT_BLOCK WHERE BLOCKER_DEVICE_ID = #{blockerDeviceId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_LIKE_LOG (PRS_ID, DEVICE_ID, ACTION, CREATED_DATE) VALUES (#{targetId}, #{deviceId}, #{actionType}, NOW())
INSERT INTO WH_FOLLOWER_LOG (PRS_ID, DEVICE_ID, ACTION, CREATED_DATE) VALUES (#{starId}, #{deviceId}, #{actionType}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT P.PRS_ID,
-- 1. 방문자(조회수) 통계: WH_AD_LOG 활용 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID AND ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' AND DATE(CREATED_DATE) = CURDATE()) AS todayVisitors, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID AND ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')) AS monthVisitors, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID AND ACTION = 'IMPRESSION') AS totalVisitors,
-- 2. 좋아요 통계: WH_LIKE_LOG 활용 (순수하게 받은 좋아요 횟수 카운트) (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_LIKE_LOG WHERE PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID AND ACTION = 'LIKE' AND DATE(CREATED_DATE) = CURDATE()) AS todayLikes, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_LIKE_LOG WHERE PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID AND ACTION = 'LIKE' AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')) AS monthLikes, IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS totalLikes,
-- 3. 즐겨찾기(팔로우) 통계: WH_FOLLOWER_LOG 활용 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_FOLLOWER_LOG WHERE PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID AND ACTION = 'FOLLOW' AND DATE(CREATED_DATE) = CURDATE()) AS todayFavorites, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_FOLLOWER_LOG WHERE PRS_ID = P.PRS_ID AND ACTION = 'FOLLOW' AND DATE_FORMAT(CREATED_DATE, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')) AS monthFavorites, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) AS totalFavorites
FROM WH_PRESS P WHERE P.PRS_ID = #{starId}

SELECT A.MEM_ID as deviceId, MAX(A.CREATED_DATE) as actionDate, -- 🌟 수정: 계정이 없으면 '사용자-기기ID앞5글자' 조합으로 이름 생성 IFNULL(P.PRS_NAME, CONCAT('사용자-', SUBSTRING(A.MEM_ID, 1, 5))) as name, IFNULL(P.STORED_FILE_NM, 'assets/img/defaultImg/avatar.svg') as image FROM WH_AD_LOG A LEFT JOIN WH_PRESS P ON A.MEM_ID = P.PRS_ID WHERE A.PRS_ID = #{starId} AND A.ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' GROUP BY A.MEM_ID, P.PRS_NAME, P.STORED_FILE_NM ORDER BY MAX(A.CREATED_DATE) DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT L.DEVICE_ID as deviceId, MAX(L.CREATED_DATE) as actionDate, -- 🌟 수정: 계정이 없으면 '사용자-기기ID앞5글자' 조합으로 이름 생성 IFNULL(P.PRS_NAME, CONCAT('사용자-', SUBSTRING(L.DEVICE_ID, 1, 5))) as name, IFNULL(P.STORED_FILE_NM, 'assets/img/defaultImg/avatar.svg') as image FROM WH_LIKE_LOG L LEFT JOIN WH_PRESS P ON L.DEVICE_ID = P.PRS_ID WHERE L.PRS_ID = #{starId} AND L.ACTION = 'LIKE' GROUP BY L.DEVICE_ID, P.PRS_NAME, P.STORED_FILE_NM ORDER BY MAX(L.CREATED_DATE) DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT F.DEVICE_ID as deviceId, MAX(F.CREATED_DATE) as actionDate, -- 🌟 수정: 계정이 없으면 '사용자-기기ID앞5글자' 조합으로 이름 생성 IFNULL(P.PRS_NAME, CONCAT('사용자-', SUBSTRING(F.DEVICE_ID, 1, 5))) as name, IFNULL(P.STORED_FILE_NM, 'assets/img/defaultImg/avatar.svg') as image FROM WH_FOLLOWER_LOG F LEFT JOIN WH_PRESS P ON F.DEVICE_ID = P.PRS_ID WHERE F.PRS_ID = #{starId} AND F.ACTION = 'FOLLOW' GROUP BY F.DEVICE_ID, P.PRS_NAME, P.STORED_FILE_NM ORDER BY MAX(F.CREATED_DATE) DESC LIMIT 500

WITH RankedStars AS ( SELECT P.PRS_ID as id, P.PRS_NAME as name, P.STORED_FILE_NM as image, P.STATUS_MSG as status, P.PRS_COUNTRY, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) as viewCount, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) AS FOLLOWER_CNT,
-- 로비(selectAllStars)와 완벽히 동일한 글로벌 랭킹 계산 ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY ( IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) * 1 + IFNULL(P.LIKE_CNT, 0) * 3 + IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) * 5 ) DESC, IFNULL(A.viewCount, 0) DESC, IFNULL(P.FOLLOWER_CNT, 0) DESC, P.PRS_ID ASC ) AS GLOBAL_RANK,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_PRESS WHERE PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND IS_STAR = 'Y') AS TOTAL_STARS
FROM WH_PRESS P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRS_ID, COUNT(*) as viewCount FROM WH_AD_LOG WHERE ACTION = 'IMPRESSION' GROUP BY PRS_ID ) A ON P.PRS_ID = A.PRS_ID WHERE P.PRS_USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.IS_STAR = 'Y' ) SELECT * FROM RankedStars WHERE id IN
#{item}
ORDER BY GLOBAL_RANK ASC
SELECT PIN_LINK_TEXT1, PIN_LINK_URL1, PIN_LINK_TEXT2, PIN_LINK_URL2 FROM WH_PIN_PROMOTION WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WH_PIN_PROMOTION ( ID, PIN_LINK_TEXT1, PIN_LINK_URL1, PIN_LINK_TEXT2, PIN_LINK_URL2, STATUS, CREATED_DATE, UPDATED_DATE ) VALUES ( 1, #{PIN_LINK_TEXT1}, #{PIN_LINK_URL1}, #{PIN_LINK_TEXT2}, #{PIN_LINK_URL2}, 'ACTIVE', NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE PIN_LINK_TEXT1 = #{PIN_LINK_TEXT1}, PIN_LINK_URL1 = #{PIN_LINK_URL1}, PIN_LINK_TEXT2 = #{PIN_LINK_TEXT2}, PIN_LINK_URL2 = #{PIN_LINK_URL2}, UPDATED_DATE = NOW()
